recommendations.title: Blind Dating

recommendations.title: Emma.
recommendations.overview: In 1800s England, a well-meaning but selfish young woman meddles in the love lives of her friends.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Arizona
recommendations.overview: Set in the midst of the 2009 housing crisis, the life of Cassie Fowler, a single mother and struggling realtor, goes off the rails when she witnesses a murder.

recommendations.title: Killer Elite
recommendations.overview: Based on a shocking true story, Killer Elite pits two of the world’s most elite operatives—Danny, an ex-special ops agent and Hunter, his longtime mentor—against the cunning leader of a secret military society. Covering the globe from Australia to Pa

recommendations.title: Go Goa Gone
recommendations.overview: A rave party off the coast of Goa goes horrifyingly and hilariously wrong when the island is overrun with zombies.

recommendations.title: The Employment
recommendations.overview: A man prepares and goes to work in a bizarre world, where the meaning of human workforce is taken to another level.

recommendations.title: Head
recommendations.overview: In this surrealistic and free-form follow-up to the Monkees' television show, the band frolic their way through a series of musical set pieces and vignettes containing humor and anti-establishment social commentary.

recommendations.title: The Big Shave
recommendations.overview: A young man walks into a meticulously clean and sterile bathroom and proceeds to shave away hair, then skin, in an increasingly bloody and graphic bathroom scene.

recommendations.title: Love Hard
